title: Skyline Gondola & Luge Review
meta_desc: Honest review of Skyline Gondola & Luge in Queenstown, NZ. Get the inside scoop on prices, age suitability, and tips for a fun family day out.
intro: The Skyline Gondola & Luge in Queenstown is a must-visit attraction for families. With stunning views of Lake Wakatipu and exciting luge rides, it's an experience your kids will never forget. But what's it really like with kids in tow?

sections.heading: What to Expect
sections.body:
The Skyline Gondola & Luge is a fantastic way to spend 2-4 hours with your family. The gondola ride up Bob's Peak offers breathtaking panoramic views of Queenstown and Lake Wakatipu. Once you reach the top, the kids can enjoy the thrilling luge ride, which they can even ride solo from the age of 3.

The restaurant at the top is also great value for lunch, with a range of options to suit all tastes and budgets. We found the staff to be friendly and accommodating, making it a great experience for families.
list: Luge ride with solo options for kids aged 3+
Restaurant with great views and value for lunch

sections.heading: Age Suitability and Value for Money
sections.body:
The Skyline Gondola & Luge is suitable for kids aged 3 and above, making it a great option for families with young children. We found it to be excellent value for money, with prices starting at $35 per child and $50 per adult.

While it may seem a bit pricey, the experience and views make it well worth the cost. We give it a family suitability rating of 9/10, with the only downside being the potential for long queues during peak season.

sections.heading: Insider Tips and Best Time to Visit
sections.body:
To make the most of your visit, we recommend heading up the gondola early in the morning or later in the afternoon to avoid the crowds. You can also book your tickets online in advance to save time and money.

Another tip is to take a jacket or sweater, as it can get quite cool at the top of the mountain, even in summer. And don't forget your camera, as the views are simply stunning!
list: Visit early in the morning or late in the afternoon

sections.heading: Booking and Saving Money
sections.body:
To book your tickets, simply head to the Skyline Gondola & Luge website and follow the prompts. You can also purchase tickets at the base of the gondola, but be aware that prices may be higher.

We recommend booking online in advance to save time and money. You can also look out for special deals and discounts, especially during the off-season.

hero_image.alt: Queenstown — home of the Skyline Gondola and Luge
